title: Jacksonville Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Jacksonville, with a Z-Score of +3.29. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The heat wave has led to extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 10.5 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 61%, and wind speed is moderate at 16.2 km/h. 
 These conditions are expected to persist, causing significant discomfort and health risks.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat wave mitigation measures to ensure public safety.
